message.content:
# OSS Security KB Maintenance Pass — Proposed Updates

---

## 1. `npm/body-parser`

### Action: UPDATE KB entries

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Advisory 1** | GHSA-qwcr-r2fm-qrc7 / CVE-2024-45590 — Denial-of-Service via missing URL-encoding depth limit | OSV / GitHub Advisory DB |
| Fix version | **1.20.3** (adds default depth limit of 32) | HISTORY.md, advisory |
| **Advisory 2** | GHSA-wqch-xfxh-vrr4 / CVE-2025-13466 — Security issue in 2.2.0 (details per advisory) | OSV / GitHub Advisory DB |
| Fix version | **2.2.1** | HISTORY.md, advisory |

**Recommended KB text:**

> **body-parser** has two known advisories. Users on the 1.x line should upgrade to ≥ 1.20.3; users on the 2.x line should upgrade to ≥ 2.2.1. Both fixes are confirmed in upstream changelogs and the GitHub Advisory DB.

---

## 2. `npm/koa-router`

### Action: NO-FORCE — retain current KB state

- OSV query: **0 package-scoped advisories.**
- GitHub repo security tab: **empty.**

**Outcome:** No evidence supports adding or modifying any vulnerability entry. Mark last-reviewed timestamp and close with **no change required**.

---

## 3. `crates.io/serde`

### Action: NO-FORCE — retain current KB state

- OSV query: **0 package-scoped advisories.**
- GitHub repo security tab: **empty.**

**Outcome:** No evidence supports adding or modifying any vulnerability entry. Mark last-reviewed timestamp and close with **no change required**.

---

## Summary

| Package | Change | Advisory Count | Minimum Safe Version(s) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `body-parser` | **Update** | 2 | 1.x → ≥ 1.20.3 · 2.x → ≥ 2.2.1 |
| `koa-router` | No-force | 0 | — |
| `serde` | No-force | 0 | — |

*All entries above are derived solely from the gathered public evidence (OSV, GitHub Advisory DB, upstream changelogs). No additional vulnerabilities, maintainers, or audit history have been inferred or fabricated.*
